about.title: Wellness Meets
about.subtitle: A fresh approach to gym-based massage therapy, since 2026.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: SSRA Academy was born from a simple observation: fitness enthusiasts deserve accessible, high-quality massage therapy exactly where they train.
story.p2: Founded in 2026, we bring professional massage therapy to where you need it most—inside gyms and now also in selected hotels. We currently operate in four cities across Germany: Köln, Leverkusen, Bergisch Gladbach, and newly in Düsseldorf.
story.p3: With our hotel service, we deliver the full SSRA Academy experience directly to business travelers and wellness guests, in-room or in the spa. Our dream is to expand throughout all of Germany—in gyms and hotels alike—giving you instant access to real recovery in seconds through our QR-code booking system.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To make professional massage therapy accessible to everyone, everywhere they train.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where recovery is as prioritized as the workout itself.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: Only certified therapists with proven expertise join our team.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Wellness shouldn't be complicated. Book in 30 seconds, anytime.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We leverage technology to create seamless wellness experiences.

community.title: Community
community.description: Building partnerships with gyms to serve fitness communities.

cta.title: Join the Movement
cta.subtitle: Experience the future of wellness therapy — at gyms and partner hotels.

servicesPage.title: Professional Massage
servicesPage.subtitle: From athletic recovery to pure relaxation, we offer a complete range of massage treatments tailored for fitness enthusiasts.

cta.title: Ready to Book?

whyMassage.title: What happens when you
whyMassage.subtitle: The difference between well-maintained and neglected muscles is not just noticeable – it's anatomically provable.
whyMassage.benefit1Desc: Regular massage releases adhesions and keeps muscle fibers supple.
whyMassage.benefit2Desc: Smooth, flexible fascia ensures mobility and less pain.
whyMassage.benefit3Desc: More oxygen, faster recovery, less injury risk.
whyMassage.risk1Desc: Untreated muscles form painful trigger points and hardening.
whyMassage.risk2Desc: Restricted mobility, chronic stiffness and increased pain sensitivity.
whyMassage.risk3Desc: Over time, tissue structure and quality can deteriorate.
whyMassage.ctaSub: Invest in your body – before it complains.
whyMassage.imageAlt: Anatomical comparison: Regular massage vs. no massage
whyMassage.imageCaption: Anatomical illustration: Left – well-maintained muscles through regular massage. Right – hardening, adhesions and tissue changes without treatment.

performance.title: Quality Meets
performance.subtitle: Real reviews from real clients. Trust in verified quality – with every session.
performance.benefit1Desc: After every session, our clients rate their therapist – so you always know what to expect.
performance.benefit2Desc: Every review is genuine, every session counts. We work transparently so you feel confident.

smartBooking.title: Every Detail,
smartBooking.subtitle: We built a system where clients communicate their needs before they arrive — so every massage is personalized from the first touch.
smartBooking.step1Desc: Before every session, clients mark their body areas and set focus zones. Your therapist arrives fully prepared — no guessing.
smartBooking.step2Desc: Have special requests, injuries, or preferences? Leave a note for your therapist — they'll read it before your session begins.
smartBooking.step3Desc: Prefer silence? Love chatting? Clients choose their communication style. Every session feels exactly right.
smartBooking.step4Desc: Pain evolution tracked across sessions. See real improvement with clinical-grade analytics — proof your therapy works.

sports_benefits: Improves range of motion and flexibility

gymPage.therapistAssignmentDesc: Your therapist will be automatically assigned based on availability and workload. The therapist may be male or female. Individual selection is not currently available.

bookingPolicy.title: Booking and Cancellation Policy
bookingPolicy.subtitle: Effective from February 2026 · Please read these policies carefully before booking.
bookingPolicy.cancellationDesc: Cancellations and rescheduling must be made **at least 24 hours** before the scheduled appointment.
bookingPolicy.cancellationHint: You can modify or cancel your appointment via the link in your confirmation email or through the "Manage Booking" page.
bookingPolicy.refund24Desc: Full refund to the original payment method.
bookingPolicy.refundLateDesc: Refund requests are handled by Paddle under Paddle's buyer refund process.
bookingPolicy.noShowDesc: Refund requests are handled by Paddle under Paddle's buyer refund process.
bookingPolicy.refundException: In exceptional cases (e.g. medical emergency), please contact us at
bookingPolicy.towelDesc: Please bring **your own towel** to every appointment. For hygiene reasons, we do not provide towels.
bookingPolicy.general1: Please arrive **10 minutes before** your scheduled appointment.
bookingPolicy.general2: Therapist contact details are not publicly visible. Bookings are made exclusively through the platform.
bookingPolicy.general3: By booking, you confirm that you have read and accepted the booking and cancellation policy.
bookingPolicy.contactNote: For questions about our policies, contact us at

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.s1Text: SSRA academy ("we", "us" or "our") is the data controller for personal data collected through our website and services. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, share and protect your personal data.
privacyPolicy.s2PersonalDesc: When booking a massage, we may collect the following data:
privacyPolicy.s2PaymentDesc: Payment processing is handled securely by Paddle.com, our Merchant of Record. We do not store complete credit card data on our servers. Paddle may collect payment card data, billing addresses and transaction histories for checkout, payment processing, tax compliance, invoicing and refund requests.
privacyPolicy.s3Desc: We use the collected data for:
s3Items: Processing and managing your massage bookings
Sending booking confirmations and appointment reminders
privacyPolicy.s4Text: We use Paddle.com as our Merchant of Record. When making a payment, your payment information is transmitted directly to Paddle using industry-standard encryption. Where applicable, Paddle uses appropriate international transfer safeguards including the EU Standard Contractual Clauses and the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. Paddle's use of your data is governed by their privacy policy, available at
privacyPolicy.s5Text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction. This includes encryption, secure servers and regular security audits.
privacyPolicy.s6Text: We retain your personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, including fulfilling legal, accounting or reporting requirements. Booking records are typically retained for 3 years after your last interaction with us.
privacyPolicy.s7Desc: Under applicable data protection law (including GDPR), you have the right to:
s7Items: Withdraw your consent at any time
privacyPolicy.s8Text: Our service uses third-party providers, including Paddle.com as Merchant of Record for checkout, payments, subscription management, tax compliance, invoicing and refund requests. These third parties have their own privacy policies governing the use of your data.
privacyPolicy.s9Text: We use essential cookies to ensure the proper functioning of our website. These cookies are necessary for the operation of our booking system and do not track you for advertising purposes.
privacyPolicy.s10Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes become effective upon publication of the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
privacyPolicy.s11Text: For questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your rights, contact us at:

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.s1Text: By using SSRA academy services, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
termsOfService.s2Text: SSRA Academy provides an online booking platform for massage services at partner locations (gyms and hotels). Our services include booking management, payment processing and scheduling for sports and classic massages — on-site at the gym or directly in your hotel room.
s3Items: All bookings are subject to availability
Payment is due at the time of booking
Prices are displayed in the local currency and include applicable taxes

Our order process is conducted by Paddle.com, our online reseller and Merchant of Record. Paddle processes payments, may appear on your bank or card statement, provides billing customer service, and handles returns and refunds.
You will receive a confirmation email after a successful booking
termsOfService.s4Desc: You can cancel your booking via the cancellation link in your confirmation email or through the "Manage Booking" page. Please note:
s4Items: Cancellation at least 24 hours before appointment: Full refund
Refund requests are handled by Paddle under Paddle's Refund Policy and Buyer Terms
Visit paddle.net with the email used at checkout to request a refund directly
termsOfService.s5Desc: By booking a massage, you confirm that:
s5Items: You have no health conditions that would prevent a massage
You will inform the therapist of any health concerns before treatment
You understand that massage therapy is not a substitute for medical treatment
You are at least 18 years old
s6Items: Provide accurate and complete information when booking
Arrive on time for your appointment
Treat our therapists and staff with respect
Not use our services for unlawful purposes
Bring your own towel to your appointment
termsOfService.s7Text: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos and images, is the property of SSRA Academy and protected by copyright. Reproduction, distribution or use of our content without prior written permission is not permitted.
termsOfService.s8Text: SSRA Academy is not liable for indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from the use of our services. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid for the specific service giving rise to the claim.
termsOfService.s9Text: Our platform uses third-party services, including Paddle.com as Merchant of Record for payment processing, billing, taxes, cancellations and refunds. Your use of these services is subject to their respective terms of service and privacy policies.
termsOfService.s10Text: We reserve the right to change these Terms of Service at any time. Changes become effective immediately upon publication on this page. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the amended terms.
termsOfService.s11Text: These Terms of Service are governed by applicable law. The courts in the relevant jurisdiction shall have exclusive jurisdiction for all disputes arising from these terms.
termsOfService.s12Text: For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at:

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.disputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
impressum.disputeEmailNote: Our email address can be found in the legal notice above.
impressum.consumerDisputeText: We are not obligated to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
impressum.contentLiabilityP1: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws. However, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.
impressum.contentLiabilityP2: Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general laws remain unaffected. However, liability in this regard is only possible from the point in time at which a concrete legal violation becomes known. If we become aware of any such legal violations, we will remove this content immediately.
impressum.linkLiabilityP1: Our website contains links to external websites of third parties, over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for these external contents. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages.
impressum.linkLiabilityP2: Permanent monitoring of the content of linked pages is not reasonable without concrete evidence of a legal violation. If we become aware of legal violations, we will remove such links immediately.
impressum.copyrightP1: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright require the written consent of the respective author or creator.
impressum.copyrightP2: If the content on this site was not created by the operator, the copyrights of third parties are respected. Should you nevertheless become aware of a copyright infringement, please inform us accordingly. If we become aware of legal violations, we will remove such content immediately.
